title: Badger Streaks
description: A mod for Origin Realms server which adds an item HUD for better keep track of the current task
body:
![Badger Streak mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503a7a5696cccddb5624b5dafb8408514a3d196e.png)


![About banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43bb319da8926a0c19488f062ba0d0a93279650d_0.webp)


**Badger Streaks** is a lightweight HUD for Minecraft. Designed for players on [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com), making it easier to follow your daily Badger Tasks without having to constantly write **/streaks** command. The HUD shows each item required and the amount you need. Once you collect enough, it marks the with as completed.

‎ 
![Features Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb8000ea32dd2c9684df37b94d418be5352779e.png)

✔️ Automatically tracks task items from your inventory  

✔️ Two visual styles (Classic and Modern)  

✔️ Fully movable HUD with scale and anchor options  

✔️ Toggle visibility with a keybind  

✔️ Auto-updates when your Tasks change  
‎ 




[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1346027647762694194?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=5865F2&label=DISCORD)](https://discord.gg/cuv5vuCC)
